payload.answer: Stored confirmed architecture principles (Brain DB as source of truth; Cognee as rebuildable semantic projection; Slack as strict intake agent) and recorded remaining open questions without resolution.
payload.decision: Persist current architecture assertions; preserve open questions as unresolved.

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB is the source of truth for the personal memory system.
Cognee is intended to be a rebuildable semantic projection derived from Brain DB.
Slack is intended to function as a strict memory intake agent.
Open question: Should Telegram be added later as an additional memory intake channel?
Open question: Which model is cheapest while saturating performance for the system?

details: Persisted durable assertions from provided context.
Preserved ambiguity by keeping Telegram/model items as open questions.

repair_options: If later context specifies Cognee implementation details (e.g., indexing method, refresh cadence), update Cognee confidence and add operational constraints.
When Telegram decision is made, replace the open question card with a resolved architecture/integration card.
When model selection criteria and results are available, replace the open question card with the chosen model and rationale.
